name: @sertiscorp/ai-review-cli
description: AI-powered code review CLI for GitLab Merge Requests

scripts.package: mkdir -p artifacts && pkg dist/cli/index.js --targets node20-linux-x64 --output artifacts/ai-review-linux-x64 && pkg dist/cli/index.js --targets node20-linux-arm64 --output artifacts/ai-review-linux-arm64 && pkg dist/cli/index.js --targets node20-macos-x64 --output artifacts/ai-review-macos-x64 && pkg dist/cli/index.js --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output artifacts/ai-review-macos-arm64 && pkg dist/cli/index.js --targets node20-win-x64 --output artifacts/ai-review-win-x64.exe
